title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: vignette demonstrates use Run_scGPT embed single-cell RNA-seq data using scGPT model(Cui et al. 2024). scGPT foundation model single-cell mRNA-Seq data. scGPT can used many different context strategies (see official github repository). particular, scGPT provides multiple possible pretrained models linked github README. models differ based training data used. common choice model whole-human scGPT_human, trained 33 million normal human cells across range tissue types. Tissue-type specific models available. also “continual pretrained model”, scGPT_CP inherits pre-trained scGPT whole-human model, supervised extra cell type labels (using Tabula Sapiens dataset). Run_scGPT run basic “zero-shot” embedding data via scg.tasks.embed_data() function scgpt python package. “Zero-shot” means input data run pretrained model, output embeddings returned. Depending model used, correspond zero-shot tutorials scGPT. tutorials also provide strategies use perform integration datasets.

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: scGPT also provides access model huggingface model. currently provide implementation model, since scGPT offers many models just available huggingface. focused implementation allows users ability work compare many different models. However, means users must download models store local directory Run_scGPT.

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: Run_scGPT takes .h5ad filename containing cell transcripts data pretrained scGPT model directory input, returns matrix cell embeddings.

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: input .h5ad file used vignette example data provided scGPT (batch_covid_subsampled_train.h5ad )[https://github.com/bowang-lab/scGPT/blob/main/tutorials/zero-shot/Tutorial_ZeroShot_Reference_Mapping.ipynb], subsetted first 100 cells run instantaneously even CPU. subsetted 100 cells can downloaded : https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Do7CXaaSTwEySGWHMKAkpN5G_g-OY8y2/view?usp=drive_link

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: pretrained scGPT model directory use scGPT_human model can downloaded : https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1oWh_-ZRdhtoGQ2Fw24HP41FgLoomVo-y model directory contain .pt file model weights, along vocab.json args.json.

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: Set paths input data model directory: Run Run_scGPT embed cells. result matrix one row per cell one column per embedding dimension:
code: dir <- "/path/to/Hackathon/" h5ad_file <- file.path(dir, "scHuman_covid/batch_covid_subsampled_test_100cells.h5ad") model_dir  <- file.path(dir, "scGPT_model") library(fomo)  result <- Run_scGPT(     h5ad_file = h5ad_file,     model_dir  = model_dir,     gene_col   = "gene_name" )

title: Running scGPT with fomo
text: basic python script underlies function : additional code added ensure runs MacOS.
code: import scanpy as sc import scgpt as scg adata = sc.read_h5ad(h5ad_file)  ref_embed_adata = scg.tasks.embed_data(     adata,     model_dir,     gene_col=gene_col,     batch_size=64, )

code: @Manual{,   title = {fomo: This package allows deploying a set of pre-defined foundation models for various tasks in R},   author = {Artur Manukyan and Dario Righelli and Juan Henao and Ilaria Billato and Gabriele Sales and Sviatoslav Kharuk and Elizabeth Purdom and Wolfgang Huber},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://biocfm.github.io/fomo/}, }

title: This package allows deploying a set of pre-defined foundation models for various tasks in R
text: package allows deploying set pre-defined foundation models various tasks R. provides interface easily access utilize models using: basilisk (https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/basilisk.html) reticulate (https://rstudio.github.io/reticulate/) tasks generating embeddings spatial imaging datasets. package designed user-friendly efficient, making accessible beginners experienced users field machine learning deep learning. basilisk reticulate used manage Python dependencies provide seamless interface R Python. However, foundation models deployed reticulate (e.g. KRONOS), example scripts building running environments can found inst/scripts/venv_builds. Currently environments following models: scGPT (https://github.com/bowang-lab/scGPT) Novae (https://github.com/prism-oncology/novae) KRONOS (https://github.com/mahmoodlab/KRONOS) Nicheformer (https://github.com/theislab/nicheformer)

code: Run_nicheformer(   adata_path = NULL,   technology = c("cosmx", "visium", "xenium", "merfish", "iss", "dissociated"),   device = "cpu" )

title: Run_nicheformer — Run_nicheformer
